# Prestigo

> Premium chauffeur service in Prague, Czech Republic. Airport transfers, intercity routes across Central Europe, corporate accounts. All-Mercedes fleet, fixed pricing, 24/7.

## Key Pages

- [Prague Airport Transfer](https://rideprestigo.com/services/airport-transfer): From €69, meet-and-greet, 60-min free wait, flight tracking.
- [Intercity Routes](https://rideprestigo.com/routes): Vienna (€485), Berlin (€580), Munich (€635), Budapest (€885), 30+ destinations.
- [FAQ](https://rideprestigo.com/faq): Booking, pricing, cancellation, vehicle questions.
- [Prague Airport Guide](https://rideprestigo.com/guides/prague-airport-to-city-center): Full 2026 comparison of all transport options from PRG.
- [Corporate Accounts](https://rideprestigo.com/corporate): Monthly invoicing, dedicated account manager, priority dispatch.

## Routes

- [Prague to Vienna](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-vienna): From €485.
- [Prague to Berlin](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-berlin): From €580.

- [Prague to České Budějovice](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-ceske-budejovice): From €255.

## Services

- [City Rides Prague](https://rideprestigo.com/services/city-rides): Hourly hire, point-to-point city transfers.
- [Group Transfers](https://rideprestigo.com/services/group-transfers): Up to 50 passengers, Mercedes V-Class fleet.
- [VIP & Events](https://rideprestigo.com/services/vip-events): Galas, private events, hotel-to-venue coordination.
- [Fleet](https://rideprestigo.com/fleet): Mercedes E-Class, S-Class, V-Class — full spec and pricing.
